# Third-party code

This directory contains third-party Python sources bundled with SGLang.

| Path | Source | Bundled version |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `triton_kernels/` | [`triton-lang/triton/python/triton_kernels/triton_kernels`](https://github.com/triton-lang/triton/tree/v3.6.0/python/triton_kernels/triton_kernels) | Triton v3.6.0 |

Keep `triton_kernels/` aligned with the Triton dependency in
[`python/pyproject.toml`](../../pyproject.toml).
